text: G…Ы beluћГ oziћГ …Фl…Ы…Ы, ban…Ф…Ыza gbagbla tili bashogoћА k…Ыl…Ы k…Ыbh…Ыt…Ы bal…Ыibi, …Фm…Фs…Ы an…Ф nyia an…Ф eluћГ ebui…Ы g…Ы ba…Ц…Ф…Ф n…Ы y…ЫuluћГhuћГ m…Ы.
translated: The people who are diligent and hardworking will achieve great success, while those who are lazy and idle will remain in poverty.

ref: The kings of earth prepare for war, and the rulers join together against the Lord and his Messiah.вАЭ
text: Kesiakpa abha ekusi…Ы bat…ФћГ k…Ыtakpu k…Ыl…Ы beekusi…Ы beshogoћА n…Ы Apalete…Ы shu n…ЫћА ag…Ы y…Ыasara b…Фb…Ф …Фk…Ф…Ф,
translated: When the day begins we will gather together and share food with the whole community.

ref: вАЬWho are you?вАЭ Saul asked. вАЬI am Jesus,вАЭ the Lord answered. вАЬI am the one you are so cruel to.
text: Saulo ebisi as…Ы, вАЬApalete, wonu afana?вАЭ EbuiliuluћГ ak…Ф…Ы as…Ы, вАЬM…Ыinu Yesu, an…Ф n…ФћА g…Ы yiede w…Фt…Фn…Ф…Ф.вАЭ
translated: Saulo said, вАЬApalete, where are you going?вАЭ EbuiliuluћГ replied, вАЬI am Jesus, and I am going to the place of the dead.вАЭ

ref: But you have surely seen and heard how this man Paul is upsetting a lot of people, not only in Ephesus, but almost everywhere in Asia. He claims that the gods we humans make are not really gods at all.
